blended.narrative: Camp Fortune is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 23 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
